title: swtpm init env-var dance duplicated across wolftpm and wolftpm-tss
description: The setenv/init/unsetenv sequence for swtpm initialization is copy-pasted between wolftpm/src/device.rs::open_swtpm and wolftpm-tss/src/connection.rs::WolfTpmSwtpm::connect. The two functions are structurally identical modulo error types. Since wolftpm-tss already depends on wolftpm-sys but not wolftpm, a shared helper in wolftpm-sys (or a small internal proc at the sys level) is impractical. The cleanest fix is to have wolftpm-tss depend on wolftpm and delegate. However, that creates a crate dependency that may not be desired. As-is, any bug fix must be applied in two places — document this explicitly with a comment pointing from one copy to the other.
